title: bupleurum fruticescens f. elatius
intro: Bupleurum fruticescens f. elatius, also known as Chinese thick-leaf bupleurum, is a plant species within the Bupleurum genus, belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum fruticescens f. elatius include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, headache, and fatigue, as well as its ability to modulate the immune system and reduce inflammation. In traditional Chinese medicine, Bupleurum fruticescens f. elatius is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or decoction, and may be combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
